description:
Dead Cells randomizer for Archipelago.
Randomizes weapons, skills, runes, upgrades, skins and aspects
across biomes, with full DLC support and Boss Cell difficulty scaling.

0.0.10.description:
Quality of life features:
- New installer; it will for you download dependencies (.net 10, DCCM), update the mod if needed and launch the game in modded.
- New in game UI, you don’t need anymore to enter your connections data in the conf.json.
- Changing the names of the items and locations in the apworld, to match the names displayed in game. Thanks to OnlyLeafeon who helped on this.

Bug Fix:
- Fix some blueprints not appearing, such as the two in the half life lore room.
- Fix some locations not being checked, such as the bobby outfit/head in lore room or the Maria outfit.

Now disabling cosmetics makes them work as in vanilla.

Apworld fixes and reworks by OnlyLeafeon.

New logo drawn by Libellule57.

0.0.11.description:
Bug Fix:
- Progressive items which stopped working as intended after the last update
- Aspects that caused a crash in some versions of dccm
- Some item names mismatch with their IDs, causing a crash

0.0.12.description:
Feature:
- New Hunter's Grenade system!
  The Hunter's Grenade is now given back when you extract a blueprint.
  You can accumulate charges for the Hunter's Grenade, 1 per biome completed.
  Using the Hunter's Grenade on a mob will decrease its charges.
  When the charges are at 0, you can no longer use it, but don't leave it behind; it will be ready to use again in the next biome.
  When you die or restart, the charges will be reset to 1.

Bug Fix:
- Rework of the entire biome check system. There were so many bugs on this (challenge rift given without doing them, exit biome not sent when quitting, restarting gave the exit check...) that I've done a brand new one.
- Apworld fixes by OnlyLeafeon.

0.0.13.description:
New Feature:
- 5 new traps:
    - Weapon break trap; break a random weapon/skill
    - Inverted controls; invert up/down, left/right, flask/homunculus rune, skill left/right, weapon left/right, jump/roll for 1 minute
    - Elite enemy trap; spawn a group of 2 to 3 elites
    - Flawless challenge (idea by Rayze); put you in a challenge rift with 1 curse
    - Lose gold; lose all your gold
- Remove item lock count in collector shop
- Items are not showing until others are unlocked in the collector shop
- Add two new options:
    - Disable death link if you still haven't sent the 13 aspects
    - Every filler stats up scroll respawn at the start of your run

Bug Fix:
- Hunter charges reset when quitting
- Ossuary, Bank, Death Arena and Crown biome enter check send 
- Allows you to open the ossuary boss door
- Remove leaderboard overlap with the connection menu
- Crash bank when exiting
- Rare crash from the item log
- Servants check not being sent
- Aspects sent trying to randomly send already checked aspects
- Runes on boss working based on what you have received
- Biome exit check sent on restart
- Hunter's grenade ui sometimes disappearing
- Lighthouse key, check not being sent and item not received
- Many mutations were renamed in the apworld
- Some wrong region logic in the apworld by OnlyLeafeon

0.0.5.description:
Add mutation option for the apworld and logic fix (by OnlyLeafeon).
Add progressive upgrades for flask, money bag and recycling.
Fix a bug that could make void locations after a game crash.

0.0.7.description:
Apworld logic reworked by OnlyLeafeon
Change in the mod to adapt to the progressive boss cells

0.0.8.description:
New features:
- New system with biomes locked until you find the corresponding key
- Apworld logic of this new system done by OnlyLeafeon

Gameplay balance:
- There is now a *4 multiplier on every cell you earn
- Finishing a biome gives you 40 cells

Bug fixed:
- Money bag and cells bag were void, now they give a random amount
- Every filler item earned was given again on each server sync

0.0.9.description: Fix a crash that occurs when trying to enter a transition with multiple exits

0.1.0.description:
New Quality of Life:
   - New menu for archipelago leading to the next features
   - History of the items you received since you launched the game
   - Filler inventory, so now you choose when the item should be dropped
   - New colorless shop, you can buy for 400 cells a colorless affix for any weapon/skill
   - Biome tracker, you can see which biomes you have access to, and what checks can still be retrieved there. For now, it's only based on your yaml options; it doesn't calculate if you have the required items. So see it more as a global to-do list

Gameplay Change:
   - Now interacting with a biome's end door sends the check even if you don't have the key
   - Disable traps between an end boss killed and your return to the prison, to avoid exploits

Bug Fixes:
   - Master's Keep biome check not being sent
   - Biome checks that could be sent using the training room
   - Not unlocking weapons after sending their check
   - Heads never being given
   - Cultist Outfit working like vanilla when disabling cosmetics
   - Items like the shipwreck key or scrolls given again when changing the difficulty

Other:
   - Adaptation of the mod for the apworld changes

Apworld Changes, mostly done by Rayze:
   - Fixed all misnamed item/location names
   - Distinguished Biome items by appending "Unlock" onto them ("Stilt Village Unlock", "Lighthouse Unlock", etc)
   - Fixed several regions either missing relevant connections, or having irrelevant connections
   - Customization Rune location should now generate again
   - Boss Heads all now require Boss Rush access logically
   - Undying Shores no longer logically counts enemies you need to encounter beforehand
   - Royal Gardener's Outfit logic missing Teleport rune rule
   - Observatory and Astrolab unlocks no longer generate items in sub-5BSC settings
   - Universal Tracker should no longer break upon receiving more than 5 boss cells
   - Items required for specific checks (Face Flask for Pentinent's Outfit, etc) now properly marked as progressive
   - Added Item Groups covering a few alternative names and all general item classifications ("Melee Weapons", "Grenades", etc)
   - Added Location Groups for locations likely to be excluded ("Boss Heads", "Flawless Cosmetics", "Respawn Checks")

0.1.1.description:
Gameplay Changes: 
- Head boss requirements changed to be after their logically last given item, so the number of kills you need to have on them is now:
   - Concierge 50 => 8; Conjunctivius 50 => 7; Mama Tick 50 => 2
   - Time Keeper 25 => 8; Giant 25 => 4; Scarecrow 25 => 2
   - Hand of the King 15 => 2; Servants 15 => 4; Queen 12 => 2; Collector  10 => 3

Launcher Changes:
- Added a fallback method for when the user has PowerShell scripts disabled.
- Added a new method for users with a non-Steam version of Dead Cells. As it is a new feature of DCCM, it might be buggier than the Steam version
- Added a button to launch the game without updating
- Added warnings when a new version is released or if the path to deadcells.exe is wrong

Bug Fixes:
- Rare crash when activating minimap tracking after receiving a rune
- Rare crash when trying to log an item received
- Hunter's Grenade not extracting blueprints for items you have already received
- White Hole and Abyssal Trident checks not being sent when you have already received the item
- Some locations in the apworld being counted where they shouldn't, adding too many filler items

Rayze's Modifications to the Apworld:
- Gave proper names to Consumables, Traps, Scrolls, and Treasure items
- Added corresponding item groups for them

0.1.2.description:
Gameplay Changes:
- Add location sync
- Disabling the Challenge Trap when doing the daily challenge
- New changes for how the daily challenge works:
  - Unlocking the 3rd blueprint doesn't require you to wait 10 days anymore. Each completion gives you one, and the difficulty increases
    - Swift Sword: base difficulty
    - Lacerating Aura: enemies have 1 extra life level and 3 extra damage levels
    - Meat Skewer: enemies have 3 extra life levels and 7 extra damage levels
  - When you already have the 3 blueprints, you gain a Hunter's grenade upon completion. It will appear in the filler inventory, and the enemies will have 5 extra life levels and 10 extra damage levels
- When the option respawn_up is enabled, the scrolls go back into the filler inventory instead of being dropped

Bug Fixes:
- Boss check not being counted in the game's tracker
- Crash when trying to launch a daily challenge
- 35 items with the issue: location not sent/accessible when you have received the item

Apworld Fixes:
- Renaming items/locations by Rayze
- Some location names mismatch with the item names
- Homunculus Rune location not generating
- Crash caused by file path for Linux users

0.1.3.description:
Gameplay Changes:
- Upgrade of the logs:
  - Better log names for biome unlocks, displaying the entire name
  - Show item sent to someone else
- The Boss Rush Unlock is now also an item/location

Apworld Fixes with the help of Rayze:
- Observatory and Astrolab unlocks should no longer appear with less than 5 BSC yaml settings
- Spider Rune giving access to Toxic Sewers is now in logic
- Cursed Biomes missing logic rule to have a second option before showing up
- Adding Uncommon BP's (1.7%) behind the Showroom Rule
- Several stray name fixes
- Boss Rush locations

Bug Fixes:
- Sync not being done right after launching the game
- Could connect to multiple servers at the same time
- Optimization of the logo image integration, causing for example a stutter when opening the inventory
- Curse link, sometimes giving curses to yourself
- King outfits not appearing in collector
- Item with a price displayed at 0 in collector
- DCCM bug in latest versions making the wrong blueprint be deleted instead of the flawless outfit

0.1.4.description:
Gameplay Changes:
- Colorless shop price lowered (400 -> 100)
- Every outfit now costs 50 (except cultist)
- The number of charges you gain with the hunter grenade is now the number of active BSC + 1
- Added offline synchronization. If you are playing and you forgot to connect, the locations you checked will be sent when you are connected to the server
- As a lot of people play on apworld versions incompatible with the mod version (ending in a crash when talking to the collector after receiving specific items), I will write from now on in the release notes which version it is compatible with, and now the apworld version is displayed in-game when connecting. The color code is: 
  - Red: too old and will cause crashes
  - Green: compatible
  - Orange: unknown as the apworld comes from a later release than the mod

Bug Fixes:
- AP versions of Dead Man's Bag and Residual Cells were overriding the vanilla ones when given once
- Crash upon entering Boss Rush
- Boss Defeats not being sent (a flag help for Universal Tracker users)

Apworld Changes by Rayze:
- Fixed Cursed Biome rules crashing generation if Bad Seed/Castlevania DLCs disabled
- Archipelago.json wasnt actually in the apworld folder, moved it there and it it no longer throws the generation disclaimer
- Fixed Parting Gift in the Graveyard missing Ram Rune rule
- Added a Location Group "Problem Heads" for the Head Checks that currently cause an accessibility warning on generation
- Renamed BossRushUnlock and added it to prefill to its associated Location

Compatible with apworld 0.1.4

0.1.5.description:
New Quality of Life:
- Improved UI responsiveness. Tested on FHD (1920x1080) and 4K (3840x2160)
- Added controller support for the Archipelago menu

Launcher Changes:
- New button to download the latest version of DCCM
- New option to help with GOG version support
- Improved .NET 10 installation

Bug Fixes:
- Maria's Cat (NPC) still spawning after sending Maria's Cat check
- Boss Rush pop-up appearing at each run start
- Compatibility issues for the new major version of DCCM

Apworld Changes by Rayze:
- Fixed Parry Shield missing Ram and Spider Rune rules
- Added rule for Acceptance route
- Abyssal Trident missing a Ram Rune rule

Compatible with apworld 0.1.4 and newer

0.1.6.description:
New Features:
- Upgrade Death Link:
  - Death Link group, sending and receiving links only to people in the same group
  - Death Trap, giving a random trap when receiving a death link instead of dying (thanks chocobo13 for the idea)
    - Sub-option for Death Trap to trigger Trap Link
- Energy Link, you can store and share your cells with other games, but you lose 20% of them upon deposit
- Damage Link, the damage you take is sent to other games, and you can receive damage from them
  - Damage Link group, similar to other link groups
- Health Link, life is shared between other Dead Cells players. Taking damage, healing, and recovery are based on percentage
  - Health Link group, similar to other link groups
  - Health Curse, sub-option that shares curses with others
- Trap Link, when receiving a trap, send this trap to other Dead Cells players (thanks StudMuffin for the idea)
  - Trap Link group, similar to other link groups

Gameplay Changes:
- Picking up a hunter's grenade while already having it now adds 5 charges
- You can now buy hunter's grenade charges in the shop, 50 cells for active BSC+1
- The Legendary shop is finally open! For only 600 cells on colorless items

New Quality of Life:
- Added error pop-up when disconnected in-game
- Added a second menu page for the Energy Link UI
  - Already responsive and controller compatible, just like the first page

Bug Fixes:
- Crash on menu when performing specific inputs with a controller
- Death Link being sent when dying directly from Death Link
- Item system not using the offline one upon disconnection, resulting in a crash and bugged location
- Pokebomb charge being used when an enemy died while extracting
- Could buy a colorless affix on a non-existent item with a controller
- Double reverse controls trap, leaving the controls always inverted

Apworld Changes with the help of Rayze:
- Fixed Sanguine Vortex missing a requirement of fully clearing a biome, which requires either Vine/Spider rune to reach the Toxic Sewers entrance, or either of the other two unlockable biomes
- Fixed assault shield located in Toxic Sewers instead of Promenade

Compatible with apworld 0.1.4 and newer

BugFix.description:
should fix:
-locked items by Flask1
-filler items not being dropped
-crash entering the swamp

FirstRelease.description: The core features for those who want to be alpha testers

NewFeatures.description:
Adding the cosmetic option to remove/add outfits and heads (thanks to OnlyLeafeon who helped on this)
Start adding the death link option
Some other bug fix
